name: Ardent Flower
descs:
At 3+ Wrath Reson., Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency, Count, or Unique 'Burn' gain Clash Power +1
- At 3+ Wrath A-Reson., or at 6+ Wrath Reson., gain +2 Clash Power instead

[Effect applies only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

When an ally attacks an enemy, if the target has ([Combustion] Potency on self)% or less HP(for Abnormalities, Core HP), deal +50% damage with Attack Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn'.
